explanation: Reordering arguments with -o to change the output path, which may avoid the Sigma rule's detection of the -O flag.
Substitution of -O with --remote-name and adding -o to specify a safe output path, which may bypass the Sigma rule's flag detection.
Omission of the -O or --remote-name flag and using -o directly, which may avoid the Sigma rule's detection of the download command.
